title: The World Unforgiving
description: An ultra-hardcore modpack that you won't be able to stand in for more than 5 days.
body: ## 🌍 About the Modpack Tired of "Hard" modpacks , the difficulty of which is only concluded in the craft length? You mastered all most famous mods, and searching for the real **chellenge**? Welocome to **The World Unforgiving**. Modpack where the skilled players **can't survive** more than 10-15 days and **no one** survived more than 30. **IC2, Mekanism, Immersive, Tinkers Construct** and some _fun_, unballanced difficulty mods. To survive you need perfect knowlege about mod mechanics, skills of time managemant, planning, good reaction and some luck. Welcome to The World Unforgiving. ## 🎥 Modpack Videos ## 🛠️ How to Install the Modpack To start playing, use the [Modrinth launcher](https://modrinth.com/app) or other multi launcher analogues - [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/), [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/) or [PrismLauncer](https://prismlauncher.org/). ## 🖥️ Modpack Installation on Servers To create a server package, use the proven [**ServerPackCreator**](https://github.com/Griefed/ServerPackCreator) program ## 🙌 Support If you have combined a bug or an error in the build, write to us in Discord - **Tim_Lord** (tim_lord) or **GideonWhite1029** (gideonwhite1029)
